title: The value of Grafana data transformations

blocks.content:
Transformations empower you to shape, combine, and enhance your data directly within Grafana Cloud, without any external processing. If your data source or integration cannot provide the data output you want, transformations are a great option.

Whether you're visualizing metrics or any other business data, transformations help you create dashboards that deliver actionable insights and drive better decision making.

Transformations in Grafana Cloud offer several key benefits:

- Easily join and merge data from different queries or data sources, providing a unified view without the need for external processing tools.
- Enrich your data by adding calculated fields, renaming columns, and restructuring tables to highlight the most important information for your audience.
- Adjust your dashboards and visualizations as requirements evolve, without waiting for changes to upstream data pipelines.

In the next milestone, you'll learn about common scenarios for popular transformations so you can choose the right one for your use case.
